description: A new tenant is moving in today. The agent must ensure the unit is ready and the tenant has all necessary information.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the first month's rent and security deposit have been paid in full.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the tenant's ledger is paid up.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the unit has been cleaned and keys are ready for pickup.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the status of the unit turnover.

nodes.task_description: Send a welcome email to the tenant with move-in instructions, including how to pick up keys and set up utilities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a comprehensive and helpful welcome email.
